name: Starter
label: Freelancer Protection System
description: Entry-level protection to prevent bad-fit clients, scope drift, and payment surprises before work begins.
audience: Best for freelancers who need fast legal and scope protection.
benefit: Implement in under an hour and protect every project from day one.

name: Pro
label: Freelancer Business Toolkit
description: Everything in Starter plus operational assets that improve workflow, professionalism, and pricing clarity.
audience: Best for freelancers scaling delivery and closing with higher confidence.
benefit: Run a cleaner client process and get paid faster with stronger systems.

name: Premium
label: Freelancer Revenue System
description: Everything in Pro plus growth assets designed to increase deal value, negotiation control, and closing power.
audience: Best for high-intent freelancers optimizing revenue and expansion.
benefit: Position as a premium operator and increase average project value.
